rsvp.title: RSVP
rsvp.description: Guest RSVP submission detailing their presence, count, and selected events.

guestName.description: Full name of the responding guest.

attendeesCount.description: Number of attendees arriving with this guest.

attendance.description: The specific wedding events the guest is RSVPing for.

createdAt.description: The date and time this response was recorded.

/rsvps/{rsvpId}.description: A collection containing all RSVP entries.
